channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saquon Barkley can set the NFL total season rushing record. All he wants is a Super Bowl win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The framed photos hang on the wall at the far end of the Philadelphia Eagles’ locker room, above the sofa in a space used as a lounge area. The picture on the left is of Saquon Barkley, an action shot from a game against the Commanders.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US Olympic gold medalist Ryan Crouser grades his acting skills in upcoming Super Bowl commercial
item.description: Three-time Olympic gold shot putter Ryan Crouser will be in a Super Bowl commercial next week, and he thinks he did pretty well for his first acting gig.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn faces more criticism for competing at age 40 than Tom Brady, Lewis Hamilton
item.description: Lindsey Vonn has faced a lot of second guessing about her comeback to ski racing at age 40 this season.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dampf, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chiefs and Eagles shouldn't be fazed by the zany extravaganza of Super Bowl opening night
item.description: Before Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs take on Jalen Hurts, Saquon Barkley and the Philadelphia Eagles in the Super Bowl, they have to tackle the media repeatedly.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2 NBA stars on the move in latest blockbuster deal: report
item.description: Two more NBA stars were reportedly on the move Sunday night as the San Antonio Spurs, Sacramento Kings and Chicago Bulls struck a three-team deal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iowa honors Caitlin Clark by retiring her number and hanging it in the rafters
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — Caitlin Clark wasn’t back in her home arena to play a game. Still, the “butterflies,” the former Iowa guard said, were quite similar. Clark returned to Iowa’s Carver-Hawkeye Arena on Sunday to have her number 22 retired in a ceremony after the Hawkeyes’ 76-67 win over No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man City thrashed 5-1 by Arsenal and Man United loses at home again in Premier League
item.description: After a recent uplift in their results, the pain returned for Manchester City and Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday. City conceded a goal inside two minutes and was overwhelmed in the second half in a 5-1 loss at Arsenal, which trimmed the gap to leader Liverpool to six points.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Brotherly love; UCSD's basketball brother-duo team up
item.description: Out at UC San Diego, the Tritons have been riding a wave of success this season as they currently sit at 17-4 with their eyes set on taking the Big West. A team fueled by relationships that go deeper than you may even know, UCSD guard Chris Howell and Assistant Coach Mikey Howell teaming up.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC
